title: EU Elevation Module
description: Manage 3D Terrain Providers for your digital twin. Choose from global providers (Cesium, MapTiler), register custom DEM sources, or process raw data into quantized mesh tiles.
howToUse1: 1. Select a terrain provider from the 3D Terrain panel in the map viewer (Cesium World, MapTiler, or custom layers).
howToUse2: 2. Add custom DEM sources (WCS/WMS endpoints) to process terrain from any national or regional provider.
howToUse3: 3. Use the Ingestion Pipeline to convert raw DEM data (GeoTIFF, ASC) into Cesium quantized mesh tiles.
howToUse4: 4. Configure API keys for premium providers in the terrain settings (⚙ icon).
noSources: No processed terrain layers. Use the ingestion pipeline or add a layer URL.
errNoSource: Provide at least one source URL
errNoFile: Please select a file to upload
ingestionDesc: Enqueue Quantized Mesh processing for a specific region.
terrainSelectDesc: Select the active elevation provider for the 3D globe.
needsApiKey: API key required — click ⚙ to configure
maptilerKeyHint: Get free key at maptiler.com (100k tiles/month)
customSourcesHint: Add a WCS/WMS endpoint to process terrain from any provider.
